mapper.sql: id, rule_id, parent_condition_id, field_code, operator, compare_type, compare_field_code, compare_value, compare_unit, logic_type, is_group, group_logic_type, sort_order, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, delete_flag
mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE condition_tree AS ( -- Base case: root conditions SELECT FROM auth_letter_rule_conditions WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} AND parent_condition_id IS NULL AND delete_flag = 0
UNION ALL
-- Recursive case: child conditions SELECT c.id, c.rule_id, c.parent_condition_id, c.field_code, c.operator, c.compare_type, c.compare_field_code, c.compare_value, c.compare_unit, c.logic_type, c.is_group, c.group_logic_type, c.sort_order, c.created_by, c.created_time, c.updated_by, c.updated_time, c.delete_flag FROM auth_letter_rule_conditions c INNER JOIN condition_tree ct ON c.parent_condition_id = ct.id WHERE c.delete_flag = 0 ) SELECT * FROM condition_tree ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT FROM auth_letter_rule_conditions WHERE parent_condition_id = #{parentConditionId} AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY sort_order
